title: Electronic document platform
abstract: Systems, methods, and computer-readable media are provided in relation to electronic document platforms. An example method may include receiving a new electronic letter of credit request, the request identifying letter of credit parameters, and at least one condition of the letter of credit associated with corresponding party profiles; obtaining a public key associated with each of the party profiles; generating a plurality of blocks on a distributed ledger on a node of a distributed plurality of nodes, each of the blocks associated with a corresponding condition of the at least one condition to be effected and encrypted with a public key corresponding to the party profile associated with the condition; and generating signals to initiate propagation of the plurality of blocks to the distributed plurality of nodes.
claims: 1. A method for managing a plurality of conditions for electronic trade finance transactions utilizing distributed ledgers of a blockchain system where distributed ledger blocks corresponding to conditions of an electronic document are stored on a series of decentralized devices acting as nodes, each node having a copy of the distributed ledgers being maintained on the each node in accordance with electronic propagation mechanisms, each electronic trade finance transaction including a bank guarantee and a payment that is triggered upon a satisfaction of trade finance transaction parameters, the method comprising: receiving a new electronic letter of credit request, the request identifying letter of credit parameters, and at least one condition of the letter of credit associated with corresponding party profiles; obtaining a public key associated with each of the party profiles; generating a plurality of blocks on a distributed ledger on a node of a distributed plurality of nodes, wherein each of the plurality of blocks is associated with a corresponding condition of the at least one condition to be effected and encrypted with a public key corresponding to the party profile associated with the corresponding condition of the at least one condition, wherein the plurality of blocks are cryptographically sequentially dependent and interconnected in a sequential arrangement such that a corresponding condition of a first block in the plurality of blocks must be satisfied prior to the satisfaction of a corresponding condition of a second block in the plurality of blocks, wherein the corresponding conditions of the first and second blocks are cryptographically sequentially dependent and interconnected in a sequential arrangement by assigning the second block with a cascaded hash of the public key corresponding to the party profile associated with the corresponding condition of the first block, wherein the cascaded hash is generated by applying a cryptographic hash function to the public key, and wherein the corresponding condition of the first block comprises a logistics hub generating and transmitting a private key corresponding to the public key and using the private key to unlock the first block; satisfying at least a portion of a condition corresponding to a specific block of the interconnected distributed ledger blocks; and receiving, at a node of the blockchain system, a transaction message indicative of satisfaction of at least a portion of the condition corresponding to the specific block of the interconnected distributed ledger blocks; upon validating, by the node of the blockchain system, that the transaction message is signed using a private key that corresponds to the public key of the specific block of the interconnected distributed ledger blocks, recording the transaction message on the distributed ledger of the node indicating satisfaction of at least a portion of the condition corresponding to the specific block of the interconnected distributed ledger blocks; generating signals to initiate propagation of the transaction message to the distributed plurality of nodes; and transmitting the generated signals to the distributed plurality of nodes.
